greeting.speaker: Rick
greeting.text: Slow afternoon. You doing alright out there?

choices.text: Fine. Had a strange morning though.
A man came in earlier I didn't recognize.

strange_follow.speaker: Rick
strange_follow.text: Never mind. Probably nothing. You eat lunch?

choices.text: There was a man in a suit.

federal.speaker: Rick
federal.text: He ask you anything personal? About how long you've been here, how you're sleeping?

something_like.speaker: Rick
something_like.text: Stay busy this afternoon. Don't go looking for him.

know_him.speaker: Rick
know_him.text: I know the type. That's enough.

quiet.speaker: Rick
quiet.text: Good. Quiet means you're doing your job right.

farewell.speaker: Rick
farewell.text: You let me know if that fellow comes back in. I want to know about it.
